section_miscategorizations.text: He has not experienced further pain since, but reports tenderness and inflammation on examination.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Tenderness and inflammation 'on examination' are clinician exam findings, not patient-reported history, and belong in the Findings/physical exam section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports no fever or elevated temperature.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Absence of fever as reported by the patient is part of the symptom history; while often summarized with vitals, it is more strictly patient-reported history rather than an objective exam finding.
